summary: Frontend testing for TeacherHubPro PDF Export - ALL REQUIREMENTS PASSED. Page 1 (Weekly Plan) fits ALL content on ONE page without overflow. Page 2 (Standards) has two columns side by side. Print preview shows exactly 2 pages total. Fonts are readable (6-11pt range).
critical_code_review_comments: PlanPrintView.js correctly implements compact layout with 0.2in margins
Font sizes: 6pt (DOK descriptions), 6.5pt (table content), 8pt (headers), 10-11pt (titles) - all readable
Page 1 contains all 4 rows: Day Theme, DOK Levels (4 levels with descriptions), Activities (9 items), Materials (7 items)
Page 2 Standards uses display:flex with gap:20px for two-column layout - confirmed side by side
No overflow detected - contentMaxBottom equals pageBottom
seed_data_creation: Used existing plan 'Unit 3 - The Big Adventure' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TeacherHubPro PDF export feature is FULLY WORKING. All user requirements met: 1) Page 1 fits ALL content without overflow (Day Theme, DOK Levels, Activities 9, Materials 7), 2) No empty white space at top of page 1, 3) Page 2 has two-column Standards layout (First Week / Second Week side by side), 4) Print preview shows exactly 2 pages, 5) Fonts are readable (6-11pt range).

details.dok_levels_row: 4 levels with descriptions (Lv1: Memory Thought, Lv2: Processing, Lv3: Strategic, Lv4: Extended)

requirement_2_no_whitespace_at_top.details: Header starts immediately at top with school name and title

screenshots: .screenshots/01_page1_complete.png - Page 1 (Weekly Plan) full view showing all content fits
.screenshots/02_page2_standards.png - Page 2 (Standards) with two columns side by side
